name: Gauss
description: Take charge with the Saint of Altra. Gauss is fast, deals high damage, and has strong survivability. Movement charges his powerful battery, so never stop moving.
passiveDescription: Moving generates an electrical current that fills Gauss' battery. Shields recharge up to |SPEED|% faster while the Recharge Delay is up to |DELAY|% shorter, based on the battery level.

abilities.name: Mach Rush
abilities.description: Burst into a hyper-sprint bowling over enemies and charging the battery. Crashing into solid objects generates a powerful shockwave. Hold to rush continuously.

abilities.name: Kinetic Plating
abilities.description: Generate armor plating that converts a portion of absorbed Kinetic Damage (Physical, <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat, <DT_FREEZE_COLOR>Cold, and <DT_EXPLOSION_COLOR>Blast) into Energy. Also protects Gauss from being staggered or knocked down. Damage Resistance is relative to the battery level.

abilities.name: Thermal Sunder
abilities.description: Siphon kinetic energy from the area, charging the battery and inflicting <DT_FREEZE_COLOR>Cold Status on nearby enemies. Hold reverses the process, draining the battery and inflicting <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Status on nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Redline
abilities.description: Push Gauss' battery beyond the redline, supercharging his Abilities and setting Fire Rate, Attack Speed, Reload Speed, and Casting Speed into overdrive. When past the redline, bolts of arcing electricity dance periodically from Gauss, exploding en masse when the ability is deactivated.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Take charge with the Saint of Altra. Gauss is fast, deals high damage, and has strong survivability. Movement charges his powerful battery, so never stop moving.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Gauss Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Gauss Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Gauss Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.changes: Made fixes towards Gauss’ Mach Crash Augment with Xata’s Whisper crushing FPS.  As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1324649-gamebreaking-ragdoll-xatas-bug-affecting-clients-with-ping-and-host-with-unplayable-fps/

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Update 32.1
patchlogs.changes: Added “Speed” stat in UI for Revenant’s Reave, and Gauss’ Mach Rush, and passive.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Revenant Prime: Hotfix 32.0.12
patchlogs.changes: Changed Gauss’ Redline Holster Speed increase to a Cast Speed increase.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Gauss

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Gauss's Kinetic Plating not generating battery when melee attacking enemies with Overguard.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes: Improved lighting performance on Gauss’ Thermal Sunder.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error related to Gauss’ Thermal Sunder on Extraction.

patchlogs.name: Garuda Prime: Update 31.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error with Gauss’ Thermal Sunder.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Hotfix 31.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error related to Gauss' Thermal Sunder.

patchlogs.name: Update 31: The New War
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Gauss’s gauge in Redline having a puffy smoke effect around it.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.additions: Lavos, Sevagoth, Xaku, Yareli, Baruuk, Gauss, Hildryn, Wisp, Protea and Grendel are now available and can be used in Frame Fighter once their Fragments have been found/Scanned.

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Gauss’ Mach Rush ability.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Hotfix 30.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Gauss’ Redline meter sound plays repeatedly if your drain & fill rates are close enough to keep it cycling back and forth around the redline.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Hotfix 30.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issues with the mix adjustment of Gauss’ Mach Rush and Redline abilities to reduce spam in the context of tight quarter situations.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.changes: Changed from a radial explosion that knocks enemies outward into a short duration vortex (like we did for Gauss’s Mach Crash Augment) so the pull is more reliable.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Gauss’ Mach Crash Augment Mod not vacuuming in ragdolled enemies.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave: Intermission III: Update 29.7.0
patchlogs.changes: Added Lavos Cordatus, Mag Gauss, Protea Mavv, Protea Telema, and Xaku Kintsu Helmet Blueprints to the Nightwave Store rotation.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes: Relaxed on the Gauss Mach Rush FOV attenuation so it doesn't become too absurd in cases of extreme speed.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Nezha Prime: 29.3.0 + 29.3.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed losing ability casting and weapon functionality when casting Gauss’ Thermal Sunder ability.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix: 29.2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Gauss Graxx Helmet flames always being orange instead of reacting to the chosen Energy Color as the rest of the Redline ability does.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: TennoGen: 29.2.1
patchlogs.changes:
Gauss Agito Skin by Rekkou
Gauss Graxx Skin by Faven

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed up lighting props so that Gauss' skirt doesn't appear completely unlit in scenes that depend on ambient light.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave Series 3: Glassmaker: Hotfix 27.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a loud gun sound playing when inspecting items in Gauss’ Leverian.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Arch-Guns becoming invisible when equipped while casting Gauss’ Redline ability. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1133653-gauss-archgun-redline-invisible-archgun/
Fixed color issue with Gauss’ Speed Gauge UI.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed texture tiling issue with Gauss’ Redline FX.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Hotfix 27.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script crash that could occur from Gauss’ Redline ability.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Hotfix 27.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Gauss’ Redline ability.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error that could occur with Gauss’ Thermal Sunder.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Melee attacks losing their hit sounds when using Gauss Redline & Kinetic Plating.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Gauss, Khora, and Wukong’s custom HUD warping oddly when in Dual Wield mode.

patchlogs.name: Atlas Prime: Hotfix 25.8.1 + 25.8.1.1
patchlogs.additions: Added 2 new tips regarding Gauss' Abilities.

patchlogs.name: Atlas Prime: Update 25.8.0 + 25.8.0.1
patchlogs.changes:
Gauss Spectres will start with 80% battery.
Added new sounds to Gauss when his Redline is filled and when it has been exceeded!
Fixed aimglide applying while holding aim with sword alone during Gauss Mach Rush, allowing you to become Zephyr.
Fixed jumping while using Gauss Mach Rush across water giving you no height, resulting in you getting wet.
Fixed Slash Status Effects dealing full damage to Gauss while Kinetic Plating is active. Status damage will be determined by current damage reduction at the time the Status occurs.

patchlogs.name: TennoGen & Nightwave Episode 5: Hotfix 25.7.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Gauss Collection description having typo in ‘Credit’.

patchlogs.name: Prime Vault: Hotfix 25.7.5
patchlogs.changes: Toned down the brightness of Gauss’ Thermal Sunder Ability.

patchlogs.name: Prime Vault: Hotfix 25.7.4 + 25.7.4.1
patchlogs.changes:
Gauss’ battery meter now builds when Reviving a teammate!
Fixed firing Exergis at the right time as Gauss’ Redline is activated causing you to be able to fire it continuously without needing to reload.
Fixed not being able to Gauss Mach Rush across the coolant in Orb Vallis Captura Scene.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.7.2 + 25.7.2.1
patchlogs.additions: Fixed a script error when casting Gauss’ Kinetic Plating ability.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed your camera flipping upside down when achieving ludicrous Gauss Mach Rush speed with maxed Field of View.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Moving Gauss increases the speed gauge, which in turn increases his shield recharge rate.
A uniquely-styled alternate helmet for Gauss.
Sleek and streamlined, Gauss' signature Syandana is sure to turn heads as you speed by!
Accelerate past the redline with Gauss. This collection includes the Gauss Warframe, Gauss Mag Helmet, Acceltra rapid-fire rocket launcher, and Akarius secondary rocket launchers.
If you’re looking for how to earn Gauss, he can be earned here on Sedna’s Disruption mode!
